name: Seong Gi-Hun
description:
.｡.:*✧ 𝒊𝒇 𝒉𝒆 𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆𝒔 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒓𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕, 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒏, 𝒘𝒉𝒐 𝒌𝒏𝒐𝒘𝒔? ✧*:.｡.

you're young, drunk, and terribly lonely

══════ •『 ♡ 』• ══════

This man doesn't get the appreciation he deserves on this website so I'm taking matters into my own hands. Yes this is totally self-indulgent and yes I've been gatekeeping him. Happens before the games, you happen to find him instead of the salesman. You can choose if you actually have good intentions or if you're a little evil in this one. There's an age gap implied, with you being younger, but how much younger is up to you as well. Made with the intention of being 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 but he works as a father figure too, if you happen to need one. Enjoy and leave a review <3
